apps.name: Shop.app
apps.description: Shop.app AI by Shopify offers intuitive product suggestions, refines searches with follow-up questions, and tracks past conversations for modified preferences.

apps.name: shopdev Shopping Assistant
apps.description: Provides personalized product recommendations, conversational assistance, and utilizes multimodal AI to combine data from different sources.

apps.name: Perplexity
apps.description: AI-powered shopping assistant with one-click checkout (for Pro users in the US), visual search, and unbiased product recommendations.

apps.name: Amazon
apps.description: Features a user-friendly interface, AI-powered search, and personalization. It has mastered personalization for shoppers.

apps.name: Google Lens
apps.description: Facilitates visual search by taking a picture of something, finding similar items online, and identifying products. Displays product info such as price and reviews.

apps.name: Rufus (Amazon)
apps.description: Amazon's built-in AI shopping assistant designed to help users find products via natural language queries and provides detailed product information.

apps.name: Infichat
apps.description: AI-powered shopping chatbot providing personalized recommendations and 24/7 customer support with minimal setup.

apps.name: Shopmate
apps.description: AI chatbot with 24/7 customer support, analyzes shopping history and preferences for intelligent recommendations.

apps.name: Tidio AI
apps.description: Customer support with live chat and chatbot functionalities, customization based on brand requirements, and easy setup.

apps.name: Gorgias
apps.description: AI-driven helpdesk solution, designed to manage conversations from multiple channels with machine learning to enhance automated workflow.

apps.name: LimeSpot Personalizer
apps.description: Delivers tailored shopping experiences with AI-driven product recommendations and dynamic content across various channels.

apps.name: Wiser
apps.description: Provides personalized product recommendations using browsing patterns, order data, and preferences.

apps.name: Claros
apps.description: AI shopping assistant for Amazon providing detailed product information through a question-based search.

apps.name: Buysmart.ai
apps.description: AI tool to find products and learn more about them through a category system and AI-driven questions.

apps.name: Rep AI
apps.description: Conversational AI Shopify app providing immediate support for customer concerns and automating support-related tasks.

apps.name: MOI (Klevu)
apps.description: Chat-based product search tool that allows visitors to ask for product information.

apps.name: Alby
apps.description: Uses generative AI to predict and answer customer queries directly on product pages.

apps.name: VanChat
apps.description: AI shopping assistant that answers customer questions and proactively suggests products to enhance sales.

apps.name: Cherry
apps.description: Image search app that focuses on shopping, that uses state-of-the-art visual recognition technology and personalized recommendations.

apps.name: Lykdat
apps.description: Lets you find fashion items by searching with images.
